title: [codereview] RollcallResource render_get does not handle uri_path correctly for /rollcall/{id} and SenML should use lichen.senml.codec.pack instead of raw list
description: The uri_path check is brittle; better to use resource mounting for /rollcall/{id}. SenML example should use the SenML profiles and pack() for consistency with other resources and spec Appendix F. Tag: codereview
